component.name: WaveFlow
component.summary: Local-first music player with a Spotify-inspired UI
Lecteur de musique local avec une interface inspirée de Spotify

description.p: WaveFlow is a local music player desktop app with a Spotify-inspired three-panel UI. It scans your local audio folders, organizes tracks by album, artist and genre, and plays them with a real-time audio engine — no streaming, no cloud, your music stays on your machine.

ul.li: Gapless playback, crossfade (static / smart album-aware / dynamic tempo-aware), ReplayGain, 6-band peaking EQ with 20 presets, playback speed 0.5×–2×
DSD → PCM conversion (256-tap Blackman-Harris FIR), FLAC, ALAC, MP3, AAC, OGG, Opus, WavPack and more via Symphonia
Real-time spectrum visualizer, fullscreen Now Playing, word-level karaoke lyrics (Enhanced LRC + TTML), sidecar .lrc / .txt auto-discovery
Smart playlists: Daily Mix, On Repeat, custom boolean rule trees, M3U import/export
Library scanner with multi-artist split, sticky compilation grouping, BLAKE3 duplicate detection, virtualised tables for 6000+ tracks
Deezer + Last.fm enrichment, Last.fm scrobbling, Discord Rich Presence, LRCLIB lyrics fetch, DLNA/UPnP server (opt-in)
WaveFlow Wrapped year-in-review, listening history, advanced search (FTS5)
14-preset theme system, mini-player window, immersive Now Playing, configurable keyboard shortcuts, 17-language UI
Multi-profile support with per-profile databases, full export/import, automatic backups

screenshot.caption: Home view — profile-aware greeting, mood radio, Daily Mix carousel
Library — virtualised album grid with Hi-Res badges and A-Z jump
Album detail — multi-disc grouping with side Now Playing panel
Immersive Now Playing — full-bleed artwork with real-time spectrum visualizer
Karaoke lyrics — word-level highlight with click-to-seek
WaveFlow Wrapped — year-in-review with top tracks, average tempo, longest streak

ul.li: New On Repeat smart playlist family — top ~30 tracks of the last 30 days with a rainbow-gradient cover
Word-level karaoke lyrics with Enhanced LRC + TTML parsing and a mot-à-mot editor
Automatic sidecar .lrc / .txt lyrics discovery next to audio files
Native OS toast notifications on track change (opt-in)
Unified player-bar layout panel with EQ presets and configurable cover-click action
Mini-player remembers position and size across launches
Audio pipeline popover on the quality footer (Source → Processing → Output)
Wrapped banner gated to the December–January season with per-year dismiss
Performance: parallel library tab prefetch, skeleton loaders, slimmer payloads via shared artwork base

description.p: Settings split into category tabs, multi-step onboarding wizard with language picker, profile delete + rename, persistent zoom with VS Code shortcuts, and a host of library/UI polish.
Stability fixes across the library scanner, playback engine and theme system.
